reasoning: The control AC-4(19) focuses on validating metadata during information transfer. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that metadata associated with network traffic and API requests is validated and enforced. NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce rules based on metadata such as labels. Admission controllers can validate metadata on resource creation or updates. Service meshes like Istio can enforce policies based on metadata for service-to-service communication.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | validation of metadata when transferring informat
